description: This is a collection of materials declassified by the National Archives and Records Administration (NARA) and released in 2019 as part of the Argentina Declassification Project. It was originally released here: https://icontherecord.tumblr.com/post/184201802948/argentina-declassification-project-april-12-2019 For additional materials released by the Project, see: https://archive.org/details/Argentina-Carter-Declassified
